stemHtml: An aircraft is taking off from a sea-level aerodrome with an outside air temperature below 15 degrees. What should a pilot be aware of regarding the controllability with one-engine inoperative?

options.a: A high VMC due to excessive rudder efficiency.
options.b: A low VMC due to the engine’s high performance.
options.c: A high VMC due to the engine's high performance.
options.d: A low V<sub>MC</sub> due to excessive rudder efficiency.
